title: RAC-ARQ
short description: RAC-ARQ, also known as MEROD and RACAL-ARQ, is a teleprinter system by Racal, used in MEROD devices. MEROD stands for Message Entry and Read Out Device. Hasn't been seen since 2010.
description: **RAC-ARQ**, also known as MEROD and RACAL-ARQ, is a teleprinter system by Racal, used in MEROD devices. MEROD stands for Message Entry and Read Out Device. Hasn't been seen since 2010.
